questions: amader area te kono special offer ache?
answers: ISP Digital e ekhon onek offer cholche! New connection e FREE installation + prothom mash FREE! Plus referral e dujone 1 mash free internet. Details er jonno amader app check korun!
Student discount ache — valid student ID dikhale jekono plan e 20% discount paben! ISP Digital shikkharthider support kore. Student ID ar institution er letter niye office e ashun!

Referral bonus: Apnar referral code diye keu new connection nile APNI ar APNAR BONDHU — dujone e 1 mash free internet paben! Unlimited referrals — joto beshi refer, toto beshi free months! ISP Digital er best offer!
Yearly subscription e MEGA discount — 12 masher dam e 14 mash internet paben, mane 2 mash completely FREE! Plus yearly subscriber der priority support ar free router upgrade dewa hoy.
Eid er somoy ISP Digital special offer dey — last Eid e 30% discount chilo 6 mash er plan e! Eid er agey amader app ar social media check korun latest offer er jonno!

Cashback offer: bKash e bill pay korle 5% cashback (max 200 taka) paben protimase! Nagad e pay korleo similar offer thake. ISP Digital er payment partners er shathe regular cashback deal cholte thake!
Bundle offer — Internet + IPTV eksha the nile 15% discount! 100 Mbps + IPTV = 2200 taka (normally 2500). ISP Digital er bundle deal e save korun ar more enjoy korun!
Loyalty reward program ache! ISP Digital e 1 year complete korle Bronze, 2 year e Silver, 3 year e Gold member hoben. Gold members paben free speed upgrade ar exclusive offers!
Pohela Boishakh, Victory Day, Independence Day — shob occasion e ISP Digital special offer dey! Notifications on rakhun app e jate kono offer miss na hoy. Shobai ke niye celebrate korar opportunity!
Area-specific offer thakte pare — notun area te ISP Digital expand korle early bird discount dey. Apnar area te ki special offer ache janar jonno app check korun ba helpline e call korun!
